# Verexa Technologies

> Empowering Canadian businesses with cutting-edge digital experiences. We specialize in web design, mobile app development, graphic design, cloud infrastructure, and IT support based in the GTA, Canada.

Verexa Technologies is a digital solutions and IT support company based in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Canada. We specialize in helping small businesses and startups with their technology needs.

## Services Offered
- Web Design & Development (Next.js, React, Node.js)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, iOS, Android)
- UI/UX & Graphic Design
- Cloud Infrastructure (AWS, Vercel, Google Cloud)
- IT Support for Small Businesses

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://verexa.ca
- Location: Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Ontario, Canada

## About Us
We deliver high-quality, state-of-the-art digital software solutions tailored to our clients' needs. Our focus is on modern aesthetics, vibrant designs, and dynamic user interfaces to ensure an engaging online presence.

## Technical Details
This site is built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Radix UI.
